shot.description: 女主站在办公室门口，压低声音质问男主。

consistency.character: 女主，同一脸型、发型和灰色西装外套
consistency.scene: 现代办公室走廊，冷色灯光，玻璃门
consistency.firstFrame: 女主站在门口，手握手机，表情克制

output: Keep the same actor identity, face, hairstyle, gray blazer, office corridor layout and cool lighting from the first frame. In one continuous 6-second vertical short-drama shot, she slowly raises her eyes toward the man inside the doorway, tightens her fingers around the phone, and asks the line with restrained anger. The camera makes a very slow push-in with subtle breathing, blinking, hair and cloth micro-motion. No cuts, no new people, no wardrobe change, no scene jump, no face morphing.
